title: Corvi's PVP
description: A pvp texture pack from the (definitely) popular youtuber @ItsCorv1
body:
This is a minecraft texture pack built for pvp. Though i plan on adding every texture in the game to this pack, not just the pvp items. This pack ranges from 16x 32x, and 64x, while not tanking your FPS!                                                

 • No mods are required.
 • Yes I plan on updating this pack frequently 

 You can feel free to edit this pack to your liking, but you can NOT distribute the edited matirial.
